---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: none
    css: styles.css
---

<div style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">
  <a href="cv.pdf" style="font-weight:600; text-decoration:none;">Download PDF CV</a>
</div>

<div class="cv-name">James C. C. Butler</div>

<div class="cv-contact">
jamesccbutler@gmail.com · +353 089 250 5361 · Ireland · Dual UK / US citizen · <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/jamescbutler">LinkedIn</a>
</div>

<div class="cv-summary">
Bioinformatician and machine learning researcher developing generative and transformer-based models to learn predictive structure from high-dimensional biological data.
</div>

## Education

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-line}
::: {.cv-left}
**University College Cork**, *PhD Computer Science & Microbiology (Marie-Curie Fellow)*
:::
::: {.cv-date}
2021--2026
:::
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
Advisor: Marcus Claesson &#124; Thesis: “Generative Modelling and Transformer-Based Sequence Learning for Microbiome Analysis”
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-line}
::: {.cv-left}
**University of St Andrews**, *MSc Applied Statistics & Datamining (Distinction)*
:::
::: {.cv-date}
2019--2020
:::
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
Advisor: Carl Donovan &#124; Thesis: “Synthetic Data for Training Convolutional Neural Networks”
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-line}
::: {.cv-left}
**Harvard University**, *BA Economics*
:::
::: {.cv-date}
2011--2015
:::
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
Secondary Field in Visual Environmental Studies
:::
:::

## Research Experience

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-line}
::: {.cv-left}
**Imperial College London**, *Research Assistant (NIHR Applied Research Collaboration)*
:::
::: {.cv-date}
2020--2021
:::
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
Designed and conducted statistical analyses to identify system-level challenges across health and social care, informing targeted interventions and evaluation strategies.
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-line}
::: {.cv-left}
**University of Pennsylvania**, *Research Assistant, Biomechanics Lab*
:::
::: {.cv-date}
2011--2012
:::
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
Contributed to research on lung injury prevention via reactive oxygen species; conducted experimental data collection and analysis on lung and brain pathologies.
:::
:::

## Publications and Manuscripts

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-sub}
Butler, J.C. Generative Artificial Intelligence for Microbiome Analysis. *Manuscript in preparation.*
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-sub}
Butler, J.C. Transformer Models for Microbiome Analysis. *Manuscript in preparation.*
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-sub}
Butler, J.C., J. Eckenberger, A. Temko, R. Khurana, M. J. Claesson. MicroDOSE: A Hybrid GAN–Diffusion Model for Microbiome Simulation and Enhanced Disease Classification. *Manuscript in preparation.*
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-sub}
Butler, J.C., A. Temko, M. J. Claesson. LaMe Diffusion: Latent Microbiome Diffusion for Robust Disease Classification. *Manuscript in preparation.*
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-sub}
Butler, J.C., S. Käll, E. Kristiansson. Meta-STOIC: A Metagenomic Sequence-Level Transformer for Order-Invariant Classification. *Manuscript in preparation.*
:::
:::

## Professional Experience

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-line}
::: {.cv-left}
**University College Cork**, *Course Demonstrator*
:::
::: {.cv-date}
2021--2024
:::
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
Computational Biology (UG); Systems Biology (MSc); Genomic Data Analysis (MSc)
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
Designed and assessed problem sets; supported lab teaching and computational assignments.
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-line}
::: {.cv-left}
**DMP Statistical Solutions UK Ltd**, *Statistical Consultant*
:::
::: {.cv-date}
2020--2022
:::
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
Designed web applications and delivered statistical reports for industry clients including L'Oréal and Raymond James.
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-line}
::: {.cv-left}
**Harvard University**, *Teaching Assistant & Guest Speaker*
:::
::: {.cv-date}
2018
:::
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
Teaching assistant for Game Theory; guest lecturer on leadership and entrepreneurship.
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-line}
::: {.cv-left}
**Le Grand Verre Wines**, *Co-founder, President & Board Member, CMO*
:::
::: {.cv-date}
2015--2019
:::
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
Led market entry and growth strategy for a premium French wine company across the US and Europe; secured $60,000 investment and established key accounts in NYC and LA.
:::
:::

## Certifications

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-line}
::: {.cv-left}

**Generative Modeling Summer School / Statlearn**
:::
::: {.cv-date}
2025
:::
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
25.5 hours of lectures, 3 hours of exercises and a 2 hour poster session; including lectures on the foundational principles of generative molecular dynamics.
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-line}
::: {.cv-left}

**Coursera**
:::
:::
::: {.cv-sub}
Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) Specialization; Neural Networks and Deep Learning; Introduction to Genomic Technologies
:::
:::

## Technical Skills

<div class="cv-sub"><strong>Programming:</strong> Python (PyTorch, HF), R, Bash</div>
<div class="cv-sub"><strong>Machine Learning:</strong> Transformers, diffusion models, GANs, representation learning, set-based models</div>
<div class="cv-sub"><strong>Statistics:</strong> GLMs, multivariate analysis, dimensionality reduction</div>
<div class="cv-sub"><strong>Bioinformatics:</strong> Metagenomics, tokenisation, microbiome statistical analysis</div>

## Interests

<div class="cv-sub">Generative AI for creative applications (animation, music); Running (2 marathons, 3:13 PB)</div>
